page_content:
Prerequisite: JOUR320 or JOUR360.

Jointly offered with: JOUR657.

Credit Only Granted for: JOUR368D or JOUR384 .

Formerly: JOUR368D.

JOUR389 News Coverage of Special Topics (1-3 Credits)

Advanced training and practice in writing and reporting news in one specialized field of interest.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.
